anchor: Stockfish UCI_Elo 1320 (local SF 16), 800 MCTS sims, 12 games each, bundled BayesElo
note: Consistent re-rating. The per-iteration model_elo column above is SF-1800-anchored and version/machine-dependent (CCRL-scaled UCI_Elo) -> NOT comparable across runs. These four are mutually consistent (same binary, same session). 12 games => +-~90 Elo CI, heavily overlapping in the middle: only pretrained>1222-era-net is statistically clear. Re-run at >=100 games to rank iter3/iter18/pretrained. The historical '1524->1222 collapse' was largely anchor noise (true spread ~260 Elo with big error bars).
